DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF WACHOVIA SECURITIES, LLC, A CORPORATION'S NOTICE AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Timothy N. Will, Esq., from Albert & Will, 310-257-9363, for Creditor Wachovia Securities LLC, appearing by telephone
Paul G. Hitchcock, Judgment Debtor in Pro Per (no card provided)

AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF WACHOVIA SECURITIES, LLC, A CORPORATION's Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption IS Granted. Even if the court eliminated the school payments and the non-tax installment payments, Defendant would still have a monthly deficit. Order signed. Judge: Peter J. Busch, not reported. (301/PJB)
